channel.title: React on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in React on Arrans github.io

item.title: dvcol/synology-download
item.description: A react web extension to manage Synology Download Station’s tasks

item.title: tldraw/tldraw
item.description: SDK for creating whiteboards and canvas experiences on the web.

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and product roadmaps in the simplest way possible.

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: preactjs/preact
item.description: ⚛️ Fast 3kB React alternative with the same modern API. Components & Virtual DOM.

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: codesandbox/codesandbox-client
item.description: An online IDE for rapid web development

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: mui/material-ui
item.description: Material UI: Ready-to-use foundational React components, free forever. It includes Material UI, which implements Google’s Material Design.

item.title: vercel/hyper
item.description: A terminal built on web technologies

item.title: evanw/esbuild
item.description: An extremely fast bundler for the web

item.title: arwes/arwes
item.description: Futuristic Sci-Fi UI Web Framework.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: keybase/client
item.description: Keybase Go Library, Client, Service, OS X, iOS, Android, Electron

item.title: codyogden/killedbygoogle
item.description: Part guillotine, part graveyard for Google’s doomed apps, services, and hardware.

item.title: kern/filepizza
item.description: 🍕 Peer-to-peer file transfers in your browser

item.title: jvatic/goja-babel
item.description: Run babel transforms using Go to transpile your modern JavaScript and JSX.

item.title: viebel/klipse
item.description: Klipse is a JavaScript plugin for embedding interactive code snippets in tech blogs.

item.title: Lucifier129/react-lite
item.description: An implementation of React v15.x that optimizes for small script size

item.title: hexops/vecty
item.description: Vecty lets you build responsive and dynamic web frontends in Go using WebAssembly, competing with modern web frameworks like React & VueJS.

item.title: ShizukuIchi/winXP
item.description: 🏁 Web based Windows XP desktop recreation.

item.title: olebedev/go-starter-kit
item.description: [abandoned] Golang isomorphic react/hot reloadable/redux/css-modules/SSR starter kit

item.title: infinitered/ai-lab
item.description: Library of components for TensorFlow.js in web frameworks.

item.title: epoch/gistlord
item.description: fast github gist searcher viewer editor manager note taker built with React & Redux
